I'm here in
Geumsan today
(Globally Important Agricultural Heritage Systems)
(Geumsan ginseng)
(Would you like to taste some?) When you harvest ginseng, you should cook and try it as well!
(Go go) I came to eat
(The taste of paradise, Geumsan ginseng) Ginseng braised spicy chicken
(The taste of paradise, Geumsan ginseng) Ginseng samgyetang
(The taste of paradise, Geumsan ginseng) Pork belly with ginseng
(Thanks to ginseng, she never gets tired of eating)
(Geumsan ginseng's transformation)
(never stops until you get recharged) It's the highlight of the day
(Infinite transformation) We have so much
It's Geumsan Goryeo Ginseng!
It gives you so much energy!
(So peaceful)

Hello, everyone
I'm here in
(Town of life) Geumsan today
- (Hi) - Can you see the ginseng?
(Impressive pose..)
(Geumsan's signature, Geumsan ginseng) Geumsan is known for ginseng
(K-culture is spreading over the world) K-POP and K-mukbang
(K-culture is spreading over the world) are getting popular in the world
They say ginseng is getting popular all over the world now too
I'm here to promote ginseng
by eating some delicious food
with ginseng
(Hold on a moment!)
(Let's quickly promote it!)
(In Geumsan, Chungcheongnam-do)
(The 41st World Ginseng Expo)

(See you at World Ginseng Expo)
(between 10.6(Fri)-10.15(Sun) where there will be food and activities)
(The 41st World Ginseng Expo from 10.6(Fri) to 10.15(Sun)) (Please come visit Geumsan!)
(See you there!)
(Ginseng street in Geumsan)
I came to Ginseng street now
(A variety of ginseng at the street) So many ginseng shops are here
(A variety of ginseng at the street) along the street
There's ginseng makgeolli too
(Ginseng makgeolli & fried ginseng catches my eye) Fried ginseng and makgeolli
Can I get one fried ginseng?
- How much is one? - It's ₩2,000 each
(₩2,000, fried ginseng for a good price)
Wow, the ginseng smell
(A wide variety of ginseng foods...!) There's ginseng jelly and ginseng candy
(Geumsan ginseng is excellent in preventing and treating various diseases) Geumsan ginseng has good anti-cancer effects

(Geumsan ginseng is excellent in preventing and treating various diseases) It's good for diabetes, blood pressure, everything
Are you not gonna have makgeolli?
Our makgeolli is really good!
(Can't resist alcohol) Then, can I get one makgeolli please?
(Ginseng makgeolli is inexpensive) They sell a cup of makgeolli and it's ₩1,000 per cup, it's really cheap
Wow, wait
This is fried ginseng!
This is red ginseng extract
(Amazed) It's good
Wow, it's really good!
- (Proud) - It's like fried sweet potato
There's a subtle ginseng flavor
It kind of taste savory
(Time to try makgeolli...!)
It's like they added something sweet
It's very subtle

and delicious!
(A cheap and healthy snack before eating) It's really hot today
(A cheap and healthy snack before eating) It feels like I rejuvenated my body
(After having a light snack, she went to..)
Wow, this is...
Geumsan Ginseng Center!
(Geumsan Ginseng Center) Geumsan Ginseng Center is here
(Entered)
What's all this?
(Geumsan Ginseng Center sells freshly harvested ginseng)
(Welcome) Hello
(Ginseng harvested right from the field is fresh ginseng) It's raw, it's called susam!
- (Try it) - What's this? Thank you
(How does the raw susam taste...?)
(It's different eaten raw...) It's a bit different
(It's different eaten raw...) It's sweet and the aroma!

It's good for your health, you'll barely get sick
It's sweet
and the aroma is so nice
(Finished looking around the Geumsan Ginseng Center) Thank you
Ah, I'm really hungry
Since I looked around,
I'll go and eat delicious food
(Never-ending fields)
I'm here at a ginseng field
It continues all the way there!
(Geumsan class) Since it's Geumsan, there are endless ginseng fields
- Oh hello! - Yes! Hello!
(Bridalwreath Spirea Village chairman, Bae Soon-chul) It's called Geumsan Goryeo Ginseng
- What's the red thing? - This is the ginseng seed
- Seed? - Yes, seed!
(Pretty red flower-like ginseng seeds...!) Seeds!

Korea's Guemsan ginseng
is a gift from God
(It has a myth of being a cure-all) There is a myth that sick parents got healed by eating this ginseng
The condition of soil and weather makes this ginseng perfect!
So it has more substances like saponin compared to other ginsengs
It's listed on Globally Important Agricultural Heritage Systems
(Ta-da)
(It's huge..!) This ginseng is so big!
(Ginseng that's been around for 5 years...!) It's been 5 years
(Ginseng that's been around for 5 years...!) 5 years?
(Ginseng that's been around for 5 years...!) Yes, 5 years
(Intern) Hold it like this
(Hi)
(It looks amazing!) There are a lot of roots
(It looks amazing...!) Yes
Ginseng is included in all kinds of dishes in Geumsan

I'm gonna eat delicious food...
Oh of course, you should!
(He's very energetic...) When you harvest ginseng, you should cook and try it as well!
It's a gift from God
(Precious one) Geumsan Goryeo ginseng
(It gives you a full of energy...!) You'll get so much energy
(Energetic) just like me!
(Hey, this is Geumsan)
(Delivering Geumsan energy) Thank you, thank you
I'm gonna go eat delicious food now!
(I'm hungry)
I'm here to eat
Wow, there's so much food here
(A variety of healthy ginseng dishes!) Ginseng braised spicy chicken
(Healthy ginseng dishes!) Ginseng samgyetang, look at how big the mushroom is!
(It has the whole shingled hedgehog in the soup) I've never seen the whole chunk of this mushroom!

(My favorite, pork belly..!) Kimchi and pork belly as well! It looks so yummy!
Oh and the most important thing,
I have ginseng here too
Thank you for the meal haha
- Please enjoy haha - Oh, thank you haha
(Surprised by the amount of servings) I'm shocked inside
For the pork belly, grill it with ginseng...!
Grill them together?
(It's an healthy upgrade version..!) It makes the pork belly
(It's an healthy upgrade version..!) more flavorful and healthy!
I made this much...
because they said you eat a lot...
but I can't still believe it...
(The chairman is surprised as well) It's almost shocking!
I'll enjoy this meal
- Eat lots - Thank you

Should I have a spoonful of the spicy braised chicken?
Mm, it's delicious!
It's like
a delicious homemade one

Looks delicious!
Should I take the whole thing?
A bit of ssamjang
Wow, this ssamjang

(Wow)
It's so tender!
Wow, why is the pork belly so good?
This is crazy!
It's so delicious
(Thumbs up for you...)

Thank you
Wow, I'll move these
I can just eat it whole
since it's that soft and delicious
I'll cut the ginseng
(Pork belly + ginseng combo?)
I'll put ginseng with pork belly
(I love this combination...!) They go well together
Pork belly wild garlic wrap
(Wild garlic is also the best)
- Is it good? - Ma'am, it's s delicious haha
- It's the best! - Thank you haha
(They grew these veggies...!) We grew them here and made pickles
(The grill shouldn't be empty..!)
Should I eat while the braised spicy chicken is being cooked?
(Braised spicy chicken with ginseng aroma)

There are potatoes in here too
They must be nice and fluffy

Ah, hot
It's so tender!
It's so delicious!
It's really delicious!
It's cooked well

With braised spicy chicken
With the root of ginseng
With perilla leaf this time!
Rice with the braised spicy chicken soup
Wow, what a deep flavor!
I'll cut the edge
(Cutting the well-grilled kimchi into bite-size pieces)

(It's a must) I can't leave out kimchi when eating pork belly
(After it cooks well...)
I'll wrap the pork belly...
Kimchi pork belly!
(Touched)
It's amazing...
(Weight loss failure = delicious food..) When you know it's good, that's even more scary
I'll put it here
(But.. didn't you forget something?)
Oh right
I didn't grill the ginseng
(Can't miss the ginseng) Ginseng is the most important here, what am I doing?
(Geumsan ginseng also landed on the grill!)
(Geumsan's best combo, pork belly + ginseng)
(We'll bring it back washed) They went to clean the grill
(Clean)

(I'll be back too) I'll heat this up too
(I'll be back too) Thank you
With wild garlic
and kimchi
Wow...
(Next pork belly is up!)
(Done) I completely filled up the grill
(Grilled ginseng) Should I try this?
(Pork belly is missing this time..) I should've left some pork belly, how silly..

(Welcome back) Thank you
(Hot) Enjoy
Actually,
I should try this shingled hedgehog
The whole thing..
I've never seen one like this

Shingled hedgehog look like this
Isn't it chewy and delicious?
Wow

so I thought I wouldn't like it
but its aroma is very good..!
As expected, wild mushrooms are different!

Wow, should I eat this too?

With ssamjang too
You're amazing...!
Oh no

It's amazing!
(Stolen reaction) It's amazing!
The flavor is soaked in

The ginseng is great
There are a lot of great things!
What kind of things?
We grow wild garlic
We grow aging chives as well...
Aging chives
only grow in our village!
(We're also within Geumsan...) It's our pride
(Geumsan's pride 1) Gifted ginseng,
(Geumsan's pride 2) perilla leaves that come out the most in Korea,

(Geumsan's pride 3) and medicinal herb are our main crops
Now, it's your turn! Cue!

Wow, this...
I'll cut

it's more
sweet!

Okay now!
After eating that,

that's made with ginseng and red ginseng

(Essert) We have this much

Sounds good!
I'll eat another bite first...

at there than here!
Filming under the hundreds-year-old tree will be much better
Last bite!
They prepared dessert for me
so I'll head out to eat it now
(Moved locations)
380 years

Wow, the scenery here...

It's the highlight of the day
This...

I'll start with this

(Cute)
I thought it'd be rice cake since it's jeolpyeon
but it's dried ginseng!
It's like eating dried persimmon
The texture is the same
And it's sweet!

They sliced the ginseng
and dried it
There is jeonggwa, not jeolpyeon
and it's whole ginseng that's dried
What's this?
Black ginseng that kids eat!
(Maybe kids can't eat it because it's bitter...?) It must be delicious if it's for kids
Kids can definitely eat this
(Ginseng for kids!) They made it very delicious
I think
(Too much energy) I'm getting healthier today, right?
What's this?
Wow
(I have ginseng inside me) There's a whole ginseng inside
Oh, it's sweet!
It's a sweet drink!

There's a subtle ginseng aroma
Oh, this looks good too!
(Convenient stick shape) It's a jelly stick
It's jelly!
Wow, cool!

This is just yummy
The ginseng flavor is very subtle
Mm, it's good!
But...
are ginseng, red ginseng, fresh ginseng, black ginseng...
all different...?!
(There are different names for ginseng, why is that?) Ginseng, red ginseng, and fresh ginseng, what's the difference?
(Ask me anything) The difference between ginseng and red ginseng?
(Fresh version) The one you harvested from the farm earlier, that's fresh ginseng
The one after it's trimmed and dried is ginseng

Then when it's boiled, dried, boiled, and dried
9 times, then that's red ginseng
Red ginseng and ginseng are all important
(Exercise is a must for health...!) but exercise is also important, you have to exercise to be strong like me
(He had abs)
Dessert red ginseng?
(Trying to get his abs back...)
They say this is the most popular one
This is called dessert red ginseng
(Dessert ginseng can be used in various ways) You can eat it with bread or mix it with water and ice as well
It's made with 6-year-old ginseng
6-year-old!
I can taste the flavor of the red ginseng
but it's very sweet
and I can feel some bits
This is yummy

It's very sweet
It'd be good as a drink with ice
(I think I need it now...)
When you eat the extract,
(It's the most delicious one...) it's almost like eating ginseng itself
because it comes from boiling red ginseng so many times

We got you(?)

Because you just eat the extract,

it's very easy to eat

This is so good!

This was so good

(Red ginseng for kids)
No additional ingredients added for this one
It's ginseng jerky!
Jeolpyeon!

I'll pass this to

Wow, this is candy!

(Globally Important Agricultural Heritage Systems, Geumsan ginseng) Anyway, red ginseng is very popular as healthy food, right?

(They have them as dessert as well!) I tried all the healthy food made with Geumsan ginseng today,
(There are many kinds and) There are various types
(everyone can enjoy it so easily) and even the kids can eat it easily
(Tzuyang's pick) I like the jeolpyoen the best because it's chewy
They prepared such
a nice meal for me today
They also prepared dessert
I enjoyed eating today!
(I ate so well today thanks to you) Thank you for eating so well
(I ate so well today thanks to you) Oh no, I think I became so healthy today
Since you ate a lot,
- you can look around the museum - The museum?
It has everything in Geumsan
(Shall we go explore?) Thank you for eating everything well
(Shall we go explore?) Thank you for preparing everything
That building is the Geumsan Ginseng General Exhibition

(Geumsan Ginseng General Exhibition)
Wow, what's all that?

(Large ginseng liquor looks amazing) Have you ever seen ginseng liquor this big?
(Geumsan Ginseng History Hall) Geumsan ginseng was around since 1500
Hello
- Hello, I'm Lee Hong-chul from Geumsan Ginseng Research - Hello
(Q. What's special about it?) What's different about Geumsan ginseng?
For types of saponin,
it has more than 30 types in our ginseng...
(It's approved all over the world) The whole world knows its excellence
(Saponin is good for anyone in all ages) and it has its history
so I think this is good for anyone for their health
(Geumsan ginseng is our pride) I didn't know

(Geumsan ginseng is our pride) I'm so amazed by this

I came to Geumsan today
and ate delicious food and ginseng
It feels like
(Fully charged) I'm full of energy
And from October 6th to October 15th,

Anyway, I ate well today
(Come to Geumsan to eat delicious and healthy ginseng!)
